title: diplazium pullingeri var. pullingeri
intro: Diplazium pullingeri var. pullingeri, also known as the Pulinger's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Diplazium pullingeri var. pullingeri include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as cough and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for internal use, and can also be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
